claim_bullets.bullet_text: Magic or items recover life force after damage (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.54-54).
First-aid recovers up to 1 point in 30 minutes (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.54-54).
Natural recovery rate is 1 point per day while at rest (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.54-54).

source_record_text: Section 4.11 of the Sword World RPG - Complete Edition covers methods of recovering life force after damage, including magical recovery, first-aid, and natural recovery.
